name: BSD RPG
description:
Woohoo! Another Bungo Stray Dogs bot!

This one is just an RPG so just do what you like. I have an idea about being transferred like I did with my Bleach bot but figured I'd just make this one and be done with it. If you do want to see that bot though just let me know and I'll get onto it.

Anyways, as usual please comment. Whether it be feedback or new ideas for new bots I'd love any type of comment

Enjoy!!

Edit: I have gotten a lot of comments asking about the information on characters I provide in the bot. I have found with this type of bot adding characters will only work to confuse it, so I have made a document that will (hopefully soon) have information on each character that you can add to your chat to make the experience better: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bRaEfZH2LC35Vwxe0wrpJFNjPihCsLzP_apEFPHVHwg/edit?usp=sharing
creator: dogie2010
